description_long: This is a light coral pink baseball cap made of soft, woven fabric, featuring a gently curved brim and a six-panel construction with stitched ventilation eyelets. The front of the cap displays an oval-shaped embroidered patch with the text 'REG. PAT. AMERICAN EAGLE OUTFITTERS' in blue, white, and red. The back of the cap has an adjustable strap in a contrasting tan color, secured with a metal clasp, and the letters 'AE' embroidered in white above the opening. The crown is rounded and slightly structured, with a fabric-covered button at the top. The overall finish is matte, with visible stitching along the seams and brim. The cap appears lightweight and flexible, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A light coral pink baseball cap with a curved brim, embroidered front patch, and adjustable tan strap at the back.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the embroidered patch, curved brim, and the main coral pink color.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the smooth crown, visible stitching, and partial view of the patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tan adjustable strap, metal clasp, and 'AE' embroidery above the opening.
description_view_3: Back-left view focusing on the crown's rounded shape, strap, and subtle seam details.
